publishedAbstract: * Large osds (greater than 16Tb) are stuck in "Init" or "CrashLoopBackOff" phase ~~~ rook-ceph-osd-0-dkfjad-73fasd 0/2 Init:2/4 5 rook-ceph-osd-1-389247-fa9832f 0/2 Init:CrashLoopBackOff 7 rook-ceph-osd-2-302ak3-84av9v 2/2 Running 2 35d ~~~
publishedTitle: Large OSDs not failing to start
